title: Phase 2A: Database schema - business core models (Customer, Product, Vendor, Inventory)
description: Add business core models to Prisma schema: Customer, CustomerContact, CustomerTag, CustomerJobsite, Product, ProductCategory, ProductCostHistory, Vendor, VendorPrice, VendorContact, InventoryLocationBalance, InventoryLengthBalance.
steps: Add Customer model with credit limit, payment terms, tax status, branch assignment
Add CustomerContact, CustomerTag, CustomerJobsite related models
Add Product model with SKU, UOM, category, cost, sell price, vendor links
Add Vendor model with payment terms, lead times, reliability metrics
Define all required enums (CustomerStatus, ProductUOM, VendorStatus, etc.)
